title: Narva, Ida-Viru County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Narva, Ida-Viru County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Narva is a city in Ida-Viru County with a population of 56,680. Estonia’s easternmost city on the Russian border, dominated by the impressive Hermann Castle facing the Russian Ivangorod Fortress across the Narva River.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
